# Dead or Alive 5

name: Infinite Health + 1 Hit Kill (Cannot be used with Low Health for Power Blows)
mode: once
w32 00222078 60000000
w32 0022207C 60000000
w32 00222080 60000000
w32 00222084 60000000
w32 00222088 60000000
w32 0022208C 60000000
w32 00222090 60000000
w32 00222094 60000000
w32 00222098 60000000
w32 0022209C 60000000
w32 002220A0 60000000
w32 002220A4 60000000
w32 002220A8 60000000
w32 002220AC 3DE00118
w32 002220B0 61EFDE20
w32 002220B4 3E000118
w32 002220B8 6210E4B0
w32 002220BC A22F002C
w32 002220C0 3A400001
w32 002220C4 B22F002C
w32 002220C8 B250002C

name: Low Health for Power Blows (Cannot be used with Infinite Health + 1 Hit Kill)
mode: once
w32 00241A88 B09E002C
w32 00241A8C 3DE00118
w32 00241A90 61EFDE20
w32 00241A94 3A200094
w32 00241A98 B22F002C
w32 00241A9C 4822207B
w32 002220B8 48241A8B

name: 1P Can Hit Anywhere + 2P Can Not Hit 1P At All
mode: once
w32 001EF614 60000000
w32 001EF414 60000000
w32 001EF304 60000000

name: 1P Can Throw Anywhere + 2P Can Not Throw 1P At All
mode: once
w32 002596B0 7C1BE800

name: Disable Block
mode: once
w32 00258540 48000018
w32 002585B8 48000064
w32 00258694 48000048
w32 002586E4 48000018

name: Disable Hold
mode: once
w32 0023BA64 480003A8
